# Build rep summary (fast aggregated path)
visit_files = sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, parse_dates=['visit_start']) for f in visit_files], ignore_index=True)
reps = pd.read_csv('sales_rep_001.csv')[['rep_id','region']]
stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')[['store_id','region']]
visits = visits.merge(stores[['store_id','region']], on='store_id', suffixes=('','_store'))

pairs = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id']).size().reset_index(name='n')
primary = pairs.sort_values(['store_id','n','rep_id'], ascending=[True,False,True]).drop_duplicates('store_id')[['store_id','rep_id']].rename(columns={'rep_id':'primary_rep_id'})

rep_metrics = visits.groupby('rep_id').agg(
    visits=('rep_id','size'),
    completed_rate=('completed_visit','mean'),
    planned_rate=('planned_visit','mean'),
    avg_duration=('duration_minutes','mean'),
).reset_index()

shelf = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('shelf_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
shelf = shelf.merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id', how='left')
rep_shelf = shelf.groupby('rep_id').agg(
    avg_facings=('facings','mean'),
    avg_width=('shelf_width_cm','mean'),
    eye_share=('shelf_level', lambda s: (s=='eye_level').mean()),
    endcap_share=('endcap_display','mean'),
    checkout_share=('checkout_display','mean'),
    promo_stand_share=('promo_stand','mean'),
    pos_materials_share=('pos_materials','mean'),
    planogram_rate=('planogram_compliance','mean'),
).reset_index()

comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
comp = comp.merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id', how='left')
rep_comp = comp.groupby('rep_id').agg(
    avg_comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'),
    comp_promo_share=('competitor_promotion','mean'),
).reset_index()

# Weighted store sales using overall visit shares to reduce primary-store confounding
weights = pairs.copy()
weights['share'] = weights['n'] / weights.groupby('store_id')['n'].transform('sum')
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
sales = sales.groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
traffic = traffic.groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store_perf = sales.merge(traffic, on='store_id').merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']], on='store_id')
rep_weighted_sales = store_perf.groupby('rep_id').agg(
    weighted_units=('units', lambda s: np.dot(s, store_perf.loc[s.index, 'share'])),
    weighted_revenue=('revenue', lambda s: np.dot(s, store_perf.loc[s.index, 'share'])),
    weighted_traffic=('traffic', lambda s: np.dot(s, store_perf.loc[s.index, 'share'])),
).reset_index()
rep_weighted_sales['units_per_customer_weighted'] = rep_weighted_sales['weighted_units']/rep_weighted_sales['weighted_traffic']
rep_weighted_sales['revenue_per_customer_weighted'] = rep_weighted_sales['weighted_revenue']/rep_weighted_sales['weighted_traffic']

# inventory weighted by visit share
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
store_oos = inv.groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
rep_oos = store_oos.merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']], on='store_id').groupby('rep_id').agg(
    weighted_oos=('oos_rate', lambda s: np.dot(s, store_oos.loc[s.index, 'oos_rate']) if False else 0)
).reset_index()
# fix weighted_oos separately due lambda index mismatch
rep_oos = store_oos.merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']], on='store_id')
rep_oos = rep_oos.groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'weighted_oos': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()

out = rep_metrics.merge(rep_shelf, on='rep_id').merge(rep_comp, on='rep_id').merge(rep_weighted_sales[['rep_id','units_per_customer_weighted','revenue_per_customer_weighted']], on='rep_id').merge(rep_oos, on='rep_id').merge(reps, on='rep_id')

# region-normalize all features, flipping bad metrics
features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','avg_facings','avg_width','eye_share','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','planogram_rate','units_per_customer_weighted','revenue_per_customer_weighted']
features_bad = ['avg_comp_facings','comp_promo_share','weighted_oos']
for m in features_good:
    out[m+'_rz'] = out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for m in features_bad:
    out[m+'_rz'] = -out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
feat_cols = [c for c in out.columns if c.endswith('_rz')]
X = out[feat_cols].fillna(0).values
X = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)

# PCA first component as latent efficiency
pca = PCA(n_components=3, random_state=0)
pcs = pca.fit_transform(X)
out['pc1'] = pcs[:,0]
# orient so lower is worse on average corresponding to quality index sign
# if pc1 correlates positively with simple average, flip if needed
simple = out[feat_cols].mean(axis=1)
if np.corrcoef(out['pc1'], simple)[0,1] < 0:
    out['pc1'] *= -1

# Gaussian mixture 2 components on pc1/simple features
Z = out[['pc1']].values
best = GaussianMixture(n_components=2, random_state=0).fit(Z)
labels = best.predict(Z)
means = pd.Series(best.means_.ravel())
low_label = means.idxmin()
out['gmm_low'] = labels==low_label

# KMeans 2 clusters on X
km = KMeans(n_clusters=2, random_state=0, n_init=20).fit(X)
km_centers = km.cluster_centers_.mean(axis=1)
low_k = km_centers.argmin()
out['kmeans_low'] = km.labels_==low_k

out['simple_avg'] = simple
print('GMM low cluster reps:', out[out.gmm_low].sort_values('pc1')[['rep_id','region','pc1','simple_avg']].to_string(index=False))
print('\nKMeans low cluster reps:', out[out.kmeans_low].sort_values('pc1')[['rep_id','region','pc1','simple_avg']].to_string(index=False))
print('\nLowest by pc1:')
print(out.sort_values('pc1').head(20)[['rep_id','region','pc1','simple_avg']].to_string(index=False))
PY","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000}

comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
comp = comp.merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id', how='left')
rep_comp = comp.groupby('rep_id').agg(avg_comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'), comp_promo_share=('competitor_promotion','mean')).reset_index()

sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
sales = sales.groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)

features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','avg_facings','avg_width','eye_share','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','planogram_rate','units_pc','revenue_pc']

feat_cols=[c for c in out.columns if c.endswith('_rz')]
out['simple_avg']=out[feat_cols].mean(axis=1)

for method in ['simple_avg','pc1']:
    gm = GaussianMixture(n_components=2, random_state=0).fit(out[[method]])
    labels=gm.predict(out[[method]])
    low=gm.means_.ravel().argmin()
    print('\nGMM low cluster on',method)
    print(out[labels==low].sort_values(method)[['rep_id','region',method,'simple_avg']].to_string(index=False))

print('\nLowest simple_avg:')
print(out.sort_values('simple_avg').head(25)[['rep_id','region','simple_avg','pc1']].to_string(index=False))

comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id')

import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np
from sklearn.mixture import GaussianMixture
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler

visit_files = sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, parse_dates=['visit_start']) for f in visit_files], ignore_index=True)
reps = pd.read_csv('sales_rep_001.csv')[['rep_id','region']]
stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')[['store_id','region']]
visits = visits.merge(stores[['store_id','region']], on='store_id', suffixes=('','_store'))
pairs = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id']).size().reset_index(name='n')
weights = pairs.copy(); weights['share'] = weights['n']/weights.groupby('store_id')['n'].transform('sum')
rep_metrics = visits.groupby('rep_id').agg(completed_rate=('completed_visit','mean'), avg_duration=('duration_minutes','mean')).reset_index()
shelf = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('shelf_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
shelf = shelf.merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id', how='left')
rep_shelf = shelf.groupby('rep_id').agg(avg_facings=('facings','mean'), avg_width=('shelf_width_cm','mean'), eye_share=('shelf_level', lambda s: (s=='eye_level').mean()), endcap_share=('endcap_display','mean'), checkout_share=('checkout_display','mean'), promo_stand_share=('promo_stand','mean'), pos_materials_share=('pos_materials','mean'), planogram_rate=('planogram_compliance','mean')).reset_index()
comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id')
rep_comp = comp.groupby('rep_id').agg(avg_comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'), comp_promo_share=('competitor_promotion','mean')).reset_index()
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store_perf = sales.merge(traffic,on='store_id').merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id')
rep_sales = store_perf.groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'units_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']), 'revenue_pc': np.average(g['revenue']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
rep_oos = inv.merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id').groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'oos_rate': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
out = rep_metrics.merge(rep_shelf,on='rep_id').merge(rep_comp,on='rep_id').merge(rep_sales,on='rep_id').merge(rep_oos,on='rep_id').merge(reps,on='rep_id')
features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','avg_facings','avg_width','eye_share','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','planogram_rate','units_pc','revenue_pc']
features_bad = ['avg_comp_facings','comp_promo_share','oos_rate']
for m in features_good:
    out[m+'_rz'] = out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for m in features_bad:
    out[m+'_rz'] = -out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
feat_cols=[c for c in out.columns if c.endswith('_rz')]
X=StandardScaler().fit_transform(out[feat_cols])
for n in [2,3]:
    gm = GaussianMixture(n_components=n, covariance_type='full', random_state=0).fit(X)
    labels = gm.predict(X)
    cluster_means = pd.DataFrame(X, columns=feat_cols).assign(label=labels).groupby('label').mean().mean(axis=1)
    low = cluster_means.idxmin()
    print('\nGMM',n,'components low cluster size', (labels==low).sum())
    print(out[labels==low].assign(score=cluster_means.loc[low]).sort_values('rep_id')[['rep_id','region']].to_string(index=False))

steps.message: I’ve got a stable low-efficiency cluster from the annual rep summaries. I’m now checking whether those same reps stay below peers month after month using visit-share-weighted monthly sales, which is the last consistency filter before I write the answer.

arguments.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np
from scipy import stats

# Base
reps = pd.read_csv('sales_rep_001.csv')[['rep_id','region']]
stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')[['store_id','region']]
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, parse_dates=['visit_start']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
visits['month'] = visits['visit_start'].dt.month
visits = visits.merge(stores[['store_id','region']], on='store_id', how='left')

# Monthly visit share weights by store-rep-month
vw = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id','month']).size().reset_index(name='visits')
store_month_vis = vw.groupby(['store_id','month'])['visits'].sum().reset_index(name='tot_visits')
vw = vw.merge(store_month_vis,on=['store_id','month'])
vw['share'] = vw['visits']/vw['tot_visits']

# Visit metrics month
visit_month = visits.groupby(['rep_id','month']).agg(completed_rate=('completed_visit','mean'), avg_duration=('duration_minutes','mean')).reset_index()

# Shelf metrics month
shelf = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('shelf_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
shelf = shelf.merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id','month']], on='visit_id')
shelf_month = shelf.groupby(['rep_id','month']).agg(planogram_rate=('planogram_compliance','mean'), endcap_share=('endcap_display','mean'), checkout_share=('checkout_display','mean'), promo_stand_share=('promo_stand','mean'), pos_materials_share=('pos_materials','mean')).reset_index()

# Competitor month
comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
comp = comp.merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id','month']], on='visit_id')
comp_month = comp.groupby(['rep_id','month']).agg(comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'), comp_promo=('competitor_promotion','mean')).reset_index()

# Weighted store-month sales by visit share
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','sales_date','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
sales['month'] = pd.to_datetime(sales['sales_date']).dt.month
sales = sales.groupby(['store_id','month'], as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','traffic_date','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
traffic['month'] = pd.to_datetime(traffic['traffic_date']).dt.month
traffic = traffic.groupby(['store_id','month'], as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store_month = sales.merge(traffic,on=['store_id','month']).merge(vw[['store_id','rep_id','month','share']], on=['store_id','month'], how='left')
weighted_sales = store_month.groupby(['rep_id','month']).apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'units_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']), 'revenue_pc': np.average(g['revenue']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()

# Weighted store-month oos
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','inventory_date','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
inv['month'] = pd.to_datetime(inv['inventory_date']).dt.month
store_oos = inv.groupby(['store_id','month'], as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
weighted_oos = store_oos.merge(vw[['store_id','rep_id','month','share']], on=['store_id','month']).groupby(['rep_id','month']).apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'oos_rate': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()

# Merge
base = reps.assign(key=1).merge(pd.DataFrame({'month':range(1,13),'key':1}), on='key').drop(columns='key')
for df in [visit_month,shelf_month,comp_month,weighted_sales,weighted_oos]:
    base = base.merge(df, on=['rep_id','month'], how='left')

features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','planogram_rate','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','units_pc','revenue_pc']
features_bad = ['comp_facings','comp_promo','oos_rate']
for col in features_good+features_bad:
    base[col] = base[col].fillna(base.groupby(['region','month'])[col].transform('mean'))
for col in features_good:
    base[col+'_z'] = base.groupby(['region','month'])[col].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for col in features_bad:
    base[col+'_z'] = -base.groupby(['region','month'])[col].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
base['score'] = base[[c for c in base.columns if c.endswith('_z')]].mean(axis=1)

cand = [3,8,17,31,45,49,64,68,75,89,98]
rows=[]
for rep, sub in base.groupby('rep_id'):
    t,p = stats.ttest_1samp(sub['score'], 0.0, alternative='less')
    rows.append({'rep_id':rep,'mean_score':sub['score'].mean(),'p_less':p})
res = pd.DataFrame(rows).merge(reps,on='rep_id')
print('Candidate scores:')
print(res[res.rep_id.isin(cand)].sort_values('mean_score')[['rep_id','region','mean_score','p_less']].to_string(index=False))
print('\nAll significant negatives p<0.05:')
print(res[(res.mean_score<0)&(res.p_less<0.05)].sort_values('mean_score')[['rep_id','region','mean_score','p_less']].to_string(index=False))
PY

traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store_perf = sales.merge(traffic,on='store_id').merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id')
rep_sales = store_perf.groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'units_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']), 'revenue_pc': np.average(g['revenue']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
rep_oos = inv.merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id').groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'oos_rate': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
out = rep_metrics.merge(rep_shelf,on='rep_id').merge(rep_comp,on='rep_id').merge(rep_sales,on='rep_id').merge(rep_oos,on='rep_id').merge(reps,on='rep_id')
features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','planogram_rate','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','units_pc','revenue_pc']
features_bad = ['avg_comp_facings','comp_promo_share','oos_rate']
for m in features_good:
    out[m+'_z'] = out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for m in features_bad:
    out[m+'_z'] = -out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for rid in [3]:
    row = out[out.rep_id==rid]
    print(row[['rep_id','region']+[c+'_z' for c in ['completed_rate','avg_duration','planogram_rate','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','units_pc','revenue_pc','avg_comp_facings','comp_promo_share','oos_rate']]].round(2).to_string(index=False))

steps.message: I’m doing one more bias check on the sales side: adjusting the weighted sales metric for each rep’s weighted store mix. This should tell me whether the “display-poor but sales-okay” reps are just being helped by easier territories.

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','rep_id']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
weights = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id']).size().reset_index(name='n')
weights['share'] = weights['n']/weights.groupby('store_id')['n'].transform('sum')
reps = pd.read_csv('sales_rep_001.csv')[['rep_id','region']]
stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store = sales.merge(traffic,on='store_id').merge(stores[['store_id','store_type','location','store_size_sqm']],on='store_id').merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id').merge(reps,on='rep_id')
rep = store.groupby(['rep_id','region']).apply(lambda g: pd.Series({
    'sales_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']),
    'revenue_pc': np.average(g['revenue']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']),
    'w_size': np.average(g['store_size_sqm'], weights=g['share']),
    'w_discount': np.average((g['store_type']=='discount').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
    'w_local': np.average((g['store_type']=='local_shop').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
    'w_supermarket': np.average((g['store_type']=='supermarket').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
    'w_urban': np.average((g['location']=='urban').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
    'w_suburban': np.average((g['location']=='suburban').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
    'w_town': np.average((g['location']=='town').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
})).reset_index()
rep['log_sales_pc'] = np.log(rep['sales_pc'])
# omit one type/location to avoid collinearity
m = smf.ols('log_sales_pc ~ np.log(w_size) + w_discount + w_local + w_urban + w_suburban + w_town + C(region)', data=rep).fit()
rep['sales_resid'] = m.resid
# region-center residuals
rep['sales_resid_z'] = rep.groupby('region')['sales_resid'].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for rid in [3,8,17,31,45,49,64,68,75,77,89,98,58,62,96]:
    print(rep[rep.rep_id==rid][['rep_id','region','sales_pc','sales_resid','sales_resid_z']].round(4).to_string(index=False))
    print()
PY

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np
from sklearn.mixture import GaussianMixture
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler

# same annual feature build
visit_files = sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, parse_dates=['visit_start']) for f in visit_files], ignore_index=True)
reps = pd.read_csv('sales_rep_001.csv')[['rep_id','region']]
stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')[['store_id','region']]
visits = visits.merge(stores[['store_id','region']], on='store_id', suffixes=('','_store'))
pairs = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id']).size().reset_index(name='n')
weights = pairs.copy(); weights['share'] = weights['n']/weights.groupby('store_id')['n'].transform('sum')
rep_metrics = visits.groupby('rep_id').agg(completed_rate=('completed_visit','mean'), avg_duration=('duration_minutes','mean')).reset_index()
shelf = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('shelf_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
shelf = shelf.merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id', how='left')
rep_shelf = shelf.groupby('rep_id').agg(planogram_rate=('planogram_compliance','mean'), endcap_share=('endcap_display','mean'), checkout_share=('checkout_display','mean'), promo_stand_share=('promo_stand','mean'), pos_materials_share=('pos_materials','mean')).reset_index()
comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id')
rep_comp = comp.groupby('rep_id').agg(avg_comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'), comp_promo_share=('competitor_promotion','mean')).reset_index()
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store_perf = sales.merge(traffic,on='store_id').merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id')
rep_sales = store_perf.groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'units_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']), 'revenue_pc': np.average(g['revenue']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
rep_oos = inv.merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id').groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'oos_rate': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
out = rep_metrics.merge(rep_shelf,on='rep_id').merge(rep_comp,on='rep_id').merge(rep_sales,on='rep_id').merge(rep_oos,on='rep_id').merge(reps,on='rep_id')
features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','planogram_rate','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','units_pc','revenue_pc']
features_bad = ['avg_comp_facings','comp_promo_share','oos_rate']
for m in features_good:
    out[m+'_rz'] = out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for m in features_bad:
    out[m+'_rz'] = -out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
feat_cols=[c for c in out.columns if c.endswith('_rz')]
X=StandardScaler().fit_transform(out[feat_cols])
for n in [4,5]:
    gm = GaussianMixture(n_components=n, covariance_type='full', random_state=0).fit(X)
    labels=gm.predict(X)
    cluster_scores = pd.DataFrame(X, columns=feat_cols).assign(label=labels).groupby('label').mean()
    cluster_scores['avg']=cluster_scores.mean(axis=1)
    print('\nGMM',n,'cluster avgs:')
    print(cluster_scores['avg'].sort_values().to_string())
    for cl in cluster_scores['avg'].sort_values().index[:2]:
        print('cluster',cl,'size', (labels==cl).sum())
        print(out[labels==cl][['rep_id','region']].sort_values('rep_id').to_string(index=False))
PY

{"cmd":"python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np
from sklearn.mixture import GaussianMixture
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler

# same annual feature build
visit_files = sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, parse_dates=['visit_start']) for f in visit_files], ignore_index=True)
reps = pd.read_csv('sales_rep_001.csv')[['rep_id','region']]
stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')[['store_id','region']]
visits = visits.merge(stores[['store_id','region']], on='store_id', suffixes=('','_store'))
pairs = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id']).size().reset_index(name='n')
weights = pairs.copy(); weights['share'] = weights['n']/weights.groupby('store_id')['n'].transform('sum')
rep_metrics = visits.groupby('rep_id').agg(completed_rate=('completed_visit','mean'), avg_duration=('duration_minutes','mean')).reset_index()
shelf = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('shelf_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
shelf = shelf.merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id', how='left')
rep_shelf = shelf.groupby('rep_id').agg(planogram_rate=('planogram_compliance','mean'), endcap_share=('endcap_display','mean'), checkout_share=('checkout_display','mean'), promo_stand_share=('promo_stand','mean'), pos_materials_share=('pos_materials','mean')).reset_index()
comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id')
rep_comp = comp.groupby('rep_id').agg(avg_comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'), comp_promo_share=('competitor_promotion','mean')).reset_index()
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store_perf = sales.merge(traffic,on='store_id').merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id')
rep_sales = store_perf.groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'units_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']), 'revenue_pc': np.average(g['revenue']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
rep_oos = inv.merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id').groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'oos_rate': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
out = rep_metrics.merge(rep_shelf,on='rep_id').merge(rep_comp,on='rep_id').merge(rep_sales,on='rep_id').merge(rep_oos,on='rep_id').merge(reps,on='rep_id')
features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','planogram_rate','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','units_pc','revenue_pc']
features_bad = ['avg_comp_facings','comp_promo_share','oos_rate']
for m in features_good:
    out[m+'_rz'] = out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for m in features_bad:
    out[m+'_rz'] = -out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
feat_cols=[c for c in out.columns if c.endswith('_rz')]
X=StandardScaler().fit_transform(out[feat_cols])
for n in [4,5]:
    gm = GaussianMixture(n_components=n, covariance_type='full', random_state=0).fit(X)
    labels=gm.predict(X)
    cluster_scores = pd.DataFrame(X, columns=feat_cols).assign(label=labels).groupby('label').mean()
    cluster_scores['avg']=cluster_scores.mean(axis=1)
    print('\nGMM',n,'cluster avgs:')
    print(cluster_scores['avg'].sort_values().to_string())
    for cl in cluster_scores['avg'].sort_values().index[:2]:
        print('cluster',cl,'size', (labels==cl).sum())
        print(out[labels==cl][['rep_id','region']].sort_values('rep_id').to_string(index=False))

import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np
from sklearn.covariance import MinCovDet
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
from scipy.stats import chi2
# build feature matrix same as previous
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['visit_id','store_id','rep_id','completed_visit','duration_minutes']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')[['store_id','region']]
reps = pd.read_csv('sales_rep_001.csv')[['rep_id','region']]
visits = visits.merge(stores,on='store_id')
pairs = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id']).size().reset_index(name='n')
weights = pairs.copy(); weights['share'] = weights['n']/weights.groupby('store_id')['n'].transform('sum')
rep_metrics = visits.groupby('rep_id').agg(completed_rate=('completed_visit','mean'), avg_duration=('duration_minutes','mean')).reset_index()
shelf = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('shelf_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']],on='visit_id')
rep_shelf = shelf.groupby('rep_id').agg(planogram_rate=('planogram_compliance','mean'), endcap_share=('endcap_display','mean'), checkout_share=('checkout_display','mean'), promo_stand_share=('promo_stand','mean'), pos_materials_share=('pos_materials','mean')).reset_index()
comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']],on='visit_id')
rep_comp = comp.groupby('rep_id').agg(avg_comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'), comp_promo_share=('competitor_promotion','mean')).reset_index()
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store_perf = sales.merge(traffic,on='store_id').merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id')
rep_sales = store_perf.groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'units_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']), 'revenue_pc': np.average(g['revenue']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
rep_oos = inv.merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id').groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'oos_rate': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
out = rep_metrics.merge(rep_shelf,on='rep_id').merge(rep_comp,on='rep_id').merge(rep_sales,on='rep_id').merge(rep_oos,on='rep_id').merge(reps,on='rep_id')
features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','planogram_rate','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','units_pc','revenue_pc']
features_bad = ['avg_comp_facings','comp_promo_share','oos_rate']
for m in features_good:
    out[m] = out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for m in features_bad:
    out[m] = -out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
feat=features_good+features_bad
out['avg']=out[feat].mean(axis=1)
X=StandardScaler().fit_transform(out[feat])
mcd=MinCovDet(random_state=0).fit(X)
d2=mcd.mahalanobis(X)
out['d2']=d2
out['p'] = 1-chi2.cdf(d2, df=X.shape[1])
print(out[(out['avg']<0) & (out['p']<0.05)].sort_values('p')[['rep_id','region','avg','d2','p']].to_string(index=False))

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
# Build annual rep features as region z and sales residual z after store-mix control (from prior setup)
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['visit_id','store_id','rep_id','completed_visit','duration_minutes']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')
reps = pd.read_csv('sales_rep_001.csv')[['rep_id','region']]
visits = visits.merge(stores[['store_id','region']], on='store_id')
pairs = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id']).size().reset_index(name='n')
weights = pairs.copy(); weights['share'] = weights['n']/weights.groupby('store_id')['n'].transform('sum')
rep_metrics = visits.groupby('rep_id').agg(completed_rate=('completed_visit','mean'), avg_duration=('duration_minutes','mean')).reset_index()
shelf = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('shelf_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']],on='visit_id')
rep_shelf = shelf.groupby('rep_id').agg(planogram_rate=('planogram_compliance','mean'), endcap_share=('endcap_display','mean'), checkout_share=('checkout_display','mean'), promo_stand_share=('promo_stand','mean'), pos_materials_share=('pos_materials','mean')).reset_index()
comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']],on='visit_id')
rep_comp = comp.groupby('rep_id').agg(avg_comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'), comp_promo_share=('competitor_promotion','mean')).reset_index()
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
rep_oos = inv.merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id').groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'oos_rate': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
# sales residual with store mix control
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','units_sold']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store = sales.merge(traffic,on='store_id').merge(stores[['store_id','store_type','location','store_size_sqm']],on='store_id').merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id').merge(reps,on='rep_id')
rep_sales = store.groupby(['rep_id','region']).apply(lambda g: pd.Series({
    'sales_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']),
    'w_size': np.average(g['store_size_sqm'], weights=g['share']),
    'w_discount': np.average((g['store_type']=='discount').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
    'w_local': np.average((g['store_type']=='local_shop').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
    'w_urban': np.average((g['location']=='urban').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
    'w_suburban': np.average((g['location']=='suburban').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
    'w_town': np.average((g['location']=='town').astype(float), weights=g['share']),
})).reset_index()
# regress within all reps with region dummies via demeaning region-specific means of sales_pc and features of store mix? simpler use region-normalized sales_pc.
rep = rep_metrics.merge(rep_shelf,on='rep_id').merge(rep_comp,on='rep_id').merge(rep_oos,on='rep_id').merge(rep_sales[['rep_id','region','sales_pc']],on=['rep_id']).merge(reps,on='rep_id', suffixes=('','_rep'))
# region-normalize features
features_good=['completed_rate','avg_duration','planogram_rate','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share']
features_bad=['avg_comp_facings','comp_promo_share','oos_rate']
for m in features_good:
    rep[m+'_z'] = rep.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for m in features_bad:
    rep[m+'_z'] = -rep.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
rep['sales_z'] = rep.groupby('region')['sales_pc'].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
X = rep[[c for c in rep.columns if c.endswith('_z') and c != 'sales_z']].values
y = rep['sales_z'].values
model = LinearRegression().fit(X,y)
rep['pred_sales_z'] = model.predict(X)
rep['resid_sales_z'] = y - rep['pred_sales_z']
print('Coefficients:')
for name,coef in zip([c for c in rep.columns if c.endswith('_z') and c != 'sales_z'], model.coef_):
    print(name, round(coef,3))
print('\nLowest predicted sales from work metrics:')
print(rep.sort_values('pred_sales_z').head(20)[['rep_id','region','pred_sales_z','sales_z','resid_sales_z']].to_string(index=False))

import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np
# fast annual composite used for final cutoff
visit_files = sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, parse_dates=['visit_start']) for f in visit_files], ignore_index=True)

stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')[['store_id','region']]
visits = visits.merge(stores[['store_id','region']], on='store_id', suffixes=('','_store'))
pairs = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id']).size().reset_index(name='n')
weights = pairs.copy(); weights['share'] = weights['n']/weights.groupby('store_id')['n'].transform('sum')
rep_metrics = visits.groupby('rep_id').agg(completed_rate=('completed_visit','mean'), avg_duration=('duration_minutes','mean')).reset_index()
shelf = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('shelf_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id')
rep_shelf = shelf.groupby('rep_id').agg(planogram_rate=('planogram_compliance','mean'), endcap_share=('endcap_display','mean'), checkout_share=('checkout_display','mean'), promo_stand_share=('promo_stand','mean'), pos_materials_share=('pos_materials','mean')).reset_index()
comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']], on='visit_id')
rep_comp = comp.groupby('rep_id').agg(avg_comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'), comp_promo_share=('competitor_promotion','mean')).reset_index()
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store_perf = sales.merge(traffic,on='store_id').merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id')
rep_sales = store_perf.groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'units_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']), 'revenue_pc': np.average(g['revenue']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
rep_oos = inv.merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id').groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'oos_rate': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
out = rep_metrics.merge(rep_shelf,on='rep_id').merge(rep_comp,on='rep_id').merge(rep_sales,on='rep_id').merge(rep_oos,on='rep_id').merge(reps,on='rep_id')
features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','planogram_rate','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','units_pc','revenue_pc']
features_bad = ['avg_comp_facings','comp_promo_share','oos_rate']
for m in features_good:
    out[m+'_z'] = out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for m in features_bad:
    out[m+'_z'] = -out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
out['simple_avg'] = out[[c for c in out.columns if c.endswith('_z')]].mean(axis=1)
ans = out.loc[out['simple_avg'] < -0.8, 'rep_id'].sort_values().tolist()
print(ans)
print(out.sort_values('simple_avg')[['rep_id','region','simple_avg']].head(15).to_string(index=False))

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np
from scipy import stats
# monthly reduced feature score
reps = pd.read_csv('sales_rep_001.csv')[['rep_id','region']]
stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')[['store_id','region']]
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, parse_dates=['visit_start']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
visits['month'] = visits['visit_start'].dt.month
visits = visits.merge(stores[['store_id','region']], on='store_id', how='left')
vw = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id','month']).size().reset_index(name='visits')
vw['share'] = vw['visits']/vw.groupby(['store_id','month'])['visits'].transform('sum')
visit_month = visits.groupby(['rep_id','month']).agg(completed_rate=('completed_visit','mean'), avg_duration=('duration_minutes','mean')).reset_index()
shelf = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('shelf_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id','month']], on='visit_id')
shelf_month = shelf.groupby(['rep_id','month']).agg(planogram_rate=('planogram_compliance','mean'), endcap_share=('endcap_display','mean'), checkout_share=('checkout_display','mean'), promo_stand_share=('promo_stand','mean'), pos_materials_share=('pos_materials','mean')).reset_index()
comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id','month']], on='visit_id')
comp_month = comp.groupby(['rep_id','month']).agg(comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'), comp_promo=('competitor_promotion','mean')).reset_index()
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','sales_date','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
sales['month'] = pd.to_datetime(sales['sales_date']).dt.month
sales = sales.groupby(['store_id','month'], as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','traffic_date','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
traffic['month'] = pd.to_datetime(traffic['traffic_date']).dt.month
traffic = traffic.groupby(['store_id','month'], as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store_month = sales.merge(traffic,on=['store_id','month']).merge(vw[['store_id','rep_id','month','share']],on=['store_id','month'])
weighted_sales = store_month.groupby(['rep_id','month']).apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'units_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']), 'revenue_pc': np.average(g['revenue']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','inventory_date','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
inv['month'] = pd.to_datetime(inv['inventory_date']).dt.month
store_oos = inv.groupby(['store_id','month'], as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
weighted_oos = store_oos.merge(vw[['store_id','rep_id','month','share']],on=['store_id','month']).groupby(['rep_id','month']).apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'oos_rate': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
base = reps.assign(key=1).merge(pd.DataFrame({'month':range(1,13),'key':1}), on='key').drop(columns='key')
for df in [visit_month,shelf_month,comp_month,weighted_sales,weighted_oos]:
    base = base.merge(df, on=['rep_id','month'], how='left')
features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','planogram_rate','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','units_pc','revenue_pc']
features_bad = ['comp_facings','comp_promo','oos_rate']
for col in features_good+features_bad:
    base[col] = base[col].fillna(base.groupby(['region','month'])[col].transform('mean'))
for col in features_good:
    base[col+'_z'] = base.groupby(['region','month'])[col].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for col in features_bad:
    base[col+'_z'] = -base.groupby(['region','month'])[col].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
base['score'] = base[[c for c in base.columns if c.endswith('_z')]].mean(axis=1)
rows=[]
for rep, sub in base.groupby('rep_id'):
    t,p = stats.ttest_1samp(sub['score'], 0.0, alternative='less')
    rows.append({'rep_id':rep,'mean_score':sub['score'].mean(),'p_less':p})
res = pd.DataFrame(rows).merge(reps,on='rep_id')
print(res[(res.mean_score<0)&(res.p_less<0.01)].sort_values('mean_score')[['rep_id','region','mean_score','p_less']].to_string(index=False))

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np
from sklearn.mixture import GaussianMixture
visits = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['visit_id','store_id','rep_id','completed_visit','duration_minutes']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_visit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)
stores = pd.read_csv('store_001.csv')[['store_id','region']]
reps = pd.read_csv('sales_rep_001.csv')[['rep_id','region']]
visits = visits.merge(stores,on='store_id')
pairs = visits.groupby(['store_id','rep_id']).size().reset_index(name='n')
weights = pairs.copy(); weights['share'] = weights['n']/weights.groupby('store_id')['n'].transform('sum')
rep_metrics = visits.groupby('rep_id').agg(completed_rate=('completed_visit','mean'), avg_duration=('duration_minutes','mean')).reset_index()
shelf = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('shelf_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']],on='visit_id')
rep_shelf = shelf.groupby('rep_id').agg(planogram_rate=('planogram_compliance','mean'), endcap_share=('endcap_display','mean'), checkout_share=('checkout_display','mean'), promo_stand_share=('promo_stand','mean'), pos_materials_share=('pos_materials','mean')).reset_index()
comp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('competitor_audit_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).merge(visits[['visit_id','rep_id']],on='visit_id')
rep_comp = comp.groupby('rep_id').agg(avg_comp_facings=('competitor_facings','mean'), comp_promo_share=('competitor_promotion','mean')).reset_index()
sales = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','units_sold','revenue']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('sales_transaction_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(units=('units_sold','sum'), revenue=('revenue','sum'))
traffic = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','customer_count']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('store_traffic_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(traffic=('customer_count','sum'))
store_perf = sales.merge(traffic,on='store_id').merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id')
rep_sales = store_perf.groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'units_pc': np.average(g['units']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share']), 'revenue_pc': np.average(g['revenue']/g['traffic'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
inv = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id','out_of_stock']) for f in sorted(glob.glob('inventory_status_*.csv'))], ignore_index=True).groupby('store_id', as_index=False).agg(oos_rate=('out_of_stock','mean'))
rep_oos = inv.merge(weights[['store_id','rep_id','share']],on='store_id').groupby('rep_id').apply(lambda g: pd.Series({'oos_rate': np.average(g['oos_rate'], weights=g['share'])})).reset_index()
out = rep_metrics.merge(rep_shelf,on='rep_id').merge(rep_comp,on='rep_id').merge(rep_sales,on='rep_id').merge(rep_oos,on='rep_id').merge(reps,on='rep_id')
features_good = ['completed_rate','avg_duration','planogram_rate','endcap_share','checkout_share','promo_stand_share','pos_materials_share','units_pc','revenue_pc']
features_bad = ['avg_comp_facings','comp_promo_share','oos_rate']
for m in features_good:
    out[m+'_z'] = out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
for m in features_bad:
    out[m+'_z'] = -out.groupby('region')[m].transform(lambda s: (s-s.mean())/s.std(ddof=0))
out['score']=out[[c for c in out.columns if c.endswith('_z')]].mean(axis=1)
for n in [2,3]:
    gm=GaussianMixture(n_components=n, random_state=0).fit(out[['score']])
    labels=gm.predict(out[['score']])
    low=gm.means_.ravel().argmin()
    print('n',n,'low size', (labels==low).sum())
    print(out[labels==low].sort_values('score')[['rep_id','region','score']].to_string(index=False))
